Metadata.CommitMsg:
fix(ci): use --autostash on git pull in trivy-config commit step

Trivy writes config-scan.json before the pull, leaving it unstaged
and causing `git pull --rebase` to error with exit 128.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
